programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Whether it was for club or country, Stuart Pearce was one of English football's greatest servants, with a reputation as a fiercely uncompromising defender. Pearce looks back at some of the highs and lows of a playing career that took him from Nottingham Forest to Newcastle, West Ham, and Manchester City, who he would then go on to manage in memorable fashion.

programme.title: REVIEW - THU 06 MAR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2018/2019 (MNC)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES

Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: A life-threatening head injury ended Oliver Glasner's playing career early, but it did nothing to quell his ambition. We go behind-the-scenes to reveal the makings of a manager who has achieved success throughout the past decade in European management, winning European titles in Germany, and the first major silverware in Crystal Palace's 120-year history.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Andoni Iraola went from relative obscurity to leading a once relegation-threatened club to its highest ever points tally in the Premier League. We explore how his fearless philosophy, tactical innovation and emotional connection to the game have driven his teams to challenge expectations and rewrite their identity. A story of a Basque footballing icon, and his remarkable journey from Cyprus to the

programme.title: 1-TO-11
programme.desc: Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England. Drawing on his experiences at Anfield and on the international stage, Garcia reflects on the talent, skill, and personalities that made his list. With insight, anecdotes and tough decisions, he builds his dream team from his unforgettable years in the Prem

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.
